name: Luscious Lime Shrimp
recipeInstructions:
1. Whisk together all ingredients except shrimp in a bowl.
2. Toss 2 tablespoons of the dressing with the shrimp.
3. Chill for 30 minutes.
4. Preheat the broiler.
5. Broil the shrimp for 1 1/2 minutes per side, until opaque.
6. Toss the shrimp with the remaining dressing and 1 tablespoon minced red pepper.
7. Cool before serving with cucumber slices.
